title: S + V + N + as + S + V（as 引導關係子句）

formulas.zh: 像...一樣的名詞；用以指出具有相同特質的人或事物

formulas.formula: the same + N + as + S + V
formulas.zh: 與...相同的名詞；表示兩者在某方面完全相同
雖然...；讓步子句，as引導讓步概念

explanation: as在此句型中有兩種主要用法：(1)作關係代名詞，在such/the same結構中指代前面的名詞，引導定義性或描述性子句；(2)作從屬連接詞，引導讓步子句。such...as表示「像...一樣的」，強調相似性；the same...as表示「與...相同的」，強調完全一致。As引導的讓步子句置於句首時，後接主句。學生常混淆as與that的用法，應注意as具有對比或比較意義。

examples.eng: Such problems as you mentioned require careful analysis and discussion.
examples.chi: 像你提到的這類問題需要仔細分析和討論。

examples.eng: She has the same passion for music as her mother had in her youth.
examples.chi: 她對音樂的熱情與她母親年輕時一樣。

examples.eng: As the old saying goes, practice makes perfect in learning English.
examples.chi: 正如古諺所說，在英文學習中熟能生巧。

examples.eng: Young as he was, he showed remarkable courage and determination in facing challenges.
examples.chi: 雖然他年輕，但他在面對挑戰時表現出非凡的勇氣和決心。

adj_table_for.zh: 引人注目的；令人印象深刻的

extension.tip: 判斷as的角色：若as後接完整子句且前有such/the same，則as為關係代名詞；若as位於句首後跟形容詞或分詞，則引導讓步子句。注意such...as中的as不能改為that，而the same...as中的as不能改為with或like。

examples.test: Such students as work hard will succeed.
examples.result: ✓ 正確。as為關係代名詞，指代students

examples.test: Such students that work hard will succeed.
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤。應用as不用that，as具比較含義

examples.test: As difficult as the task was, they completed it successfully.
examples.result: ✓ 正確。As引導讓步子句，表示雖然任務困難

extension.note: 記住：such/the same後一定搭配as；As開頭通常引導讓步，表示「雖然...」。

parts: you face in your studies demand both patience and strategy.
exercises.sentence: Such challenges as you face in your studies demand both patience and strategy.
exercises.translation: 像你在學習中所面臨的這類挑戰需要耐心和策略。

exercises.sentence: He has the same passion for literature as his grandfather had decades ago.
exercises.translation: 他對文學的熱情與他祖父幾十年前的一樣。

parts: the goal is, we must never lose sight of our principles.
exercises.sentence: As important as the goal is, we must never lose sight of our principles.
exercises.translation: 雖然目標很重要，但我們絕不能忽視我們的原則。

parts: rarely come your way deserve your full attention and commitment.
exercises.sentence: Such opportunities as rarely come your way deserve your full attention and commitment.
exercises.translation: 像那些很少來臨的機會應該得到你的充分關注和承諾。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係代名詞，完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: Such problems _______ you mentioned in the meeting require immediate attention.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (as)。在 such...as 結構中，as 作關係代名詞指代前面的 problems，表示「像你提到的那些問題」。B 項 that 與 such 搭配時常用，但此句已有 such，應用 as 強調相似性；C 項 which 無法與 such 搭配；D 項 what 為疑問或關係代名詞，用法不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入適當的關係代名詞，表達相同意義
mc_exercises.question_eng: She has the same dedication to her career _______ her father demonstrated throughout his life.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (as)。在 the same...as 結構中，as 作關係代名詞，表示「與…相同的」，表達完全一致性。此句意為「她對事業的投入與父親一生所展現的相同」。A 項 that 雖可與 the same 搭配，但此處應用 as 更能表達比較對照的意義；B、D 項不適合此結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據句意選擇正確的連接詞，注意讓步子句的用法
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ exhausted _______ he was after the long journey, John still managed to help his friend move house.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (As...as)。此句為倒裝的讓步子句，As 作從屬連接詞引導讓步狀況。句式為「As + 形容詞 + as + S + V」，表「儘管…」，意為「儘管他旅途勞累」。B 項 Although 後不可用 as；C 項 though 也可，但前空應為 Though 而非 As；D 項 Because 不表讓步。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的結構，完成複雜的比較句。難度最高
mc_exercises.question_eng: Such innovative technologies _______ are being developed in Silicon Valley have transformed industries in ways _______ few could have predicted a decade ago.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (as/that)。第一空：在 such...as 結構中，as 作關係代名詞指代 technologies，引導定義性子句。第二空：ways 後接 that 形成 ways that...(定義性子句)，表達「人們無法預測的方式」。A 項兩個 as 會造成結構混亂；B 項兩個 that 違反 such 的搭配規則；D 項 which 不能與 such 搭配。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我喜歡像莎士比亞一樣偉大的作家。
translation_exercises.answer: I like such great writers as Shakespeare.
key_points: 莎士比亞作為具體例子
hints: 提示1：使用 such...as 結構，as 引導關係子句補充說明名詞
提示2：不要用 that 替代 as，as 在此帶有「像...一樣」的比較意義

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我們應該學習像愛因斯坦一樣的科學家所具有的好奇心。
translation_exercises.answer: We should learn the curiosity that such scientists as Einstein possess.
hints: 提示1：such...as 結構中，as 後可接具體人物或例子補充說明前面的名詞
提示2：注意 possess 與 have 的差異，possess 較為正式，常用於表達抽象特質

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他報名參加了與去年相同的暑假志工計劃。
translation_exercises.answer: He enrolled in the same summer volunteer program as he did last year.
key_points: 暑假志工計劃(summer volunteer program)
hints: 提示1：使用 the same...as 表示完全一致，as 引導比較子句，強調前後相同
提示2：比較子句可省略重複動詞，但完整寫法為 as he did last year

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 雖然這個城市面臨著許多挑戰，但它仍保有像前輩城市那樣的堅韌精神，展現出對未來的信心。
translation_exercises.answer: As this city faces many challenges, it still retains the same resilient spirit as older cities do, demonstrating confidence in the future.
key_points: As 引導讓步子句置於句首
主句與讓步子句的邏輯對比
hints: 提示1：As 可作從屬連接詞引導讓步子句置於句首（意為「雖然」），後接主句，形成前讓步後轉折的結構
提示2：留意 as 在此句型有兩種用法：(1)引導讓步子句的 As faces...；(2)在 the same...as 結構中作關係代名詞，兩者不可混淆
